author: feqifei 🇮🇹 [COOL] [CALM]
msg:
[Photo] I'm playing with Automate app to create some automatic tasks on S8s of a farm box. In order to run shell commands inside Automate I need to set its Privilege Service start method to ADB. By doing so android should generate a pairing and authorize Automate to run with root privilege. When I set that method to ADB on S8s that come from Europe (SM-G950F / SM-G955F) the pairing happens automatically. When I try on models that come from US (SM-G950U / SM-G955U1) a notification pops up but I never receive a message where I can allow the pairing as requested. The app switch to Settings menu without highlighting any specific parameter, I don't understand what it's asking for
I tried on both LAN and USB, same behavior. Any idea on how to solve it?
